title: crataegus pedicellata f. assurgens
intro: Crataegus pedicellata f. assurgens is a variant of the Hawthorn tree, specifically a form of the Crataegus pedicellata species, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is rich in bioflavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Crataegus pedicellata f. assurgens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of heart failure, high blood pressure, and anxiety. The health benefits of this plant include improved circulation, reduced stress levels, and a decrease in the risk of cardiovascular disease.
